sources.notes: TCGA Breast Cancer 2012 Nature. PMC full text has gene names stripped from HTML references but gene context is recoverable from mutation frequency data and pathway descriptions. SMGs explicitly named in results: TP53 (80% Basal/12% LumA/29% LumB), PIK3CA (45% LumA/29% LumB), GATA3 (Luminal enriched), MAP3K1 (Luminal A), CDH1 (lobular subtype 30/36), PTEN (loss in Basal). Key pathway findings with named genes: (1) HER2 amplicon: ERBB2 amplified 80% HER2E, co-overexpression of EGFR/HER1 confirmed by RPPA with pHER2(Y1248) and pHER1(Y992); additional somatic mutations in ERBB3 and ERBB4 noted for drug targets; (2) RB1 pathway: RB1 protein/mRNA detected in Luminal cancers, CCND1 amplification in Luminal B, CDKN2C (p18) lowest in Luminal A; (3) PI3K pathway: PIK3CA mutations disconnected from RPPA pAKT/pS6 in LumA, PTEN loss and INPP4B loss Basal-like features, AKT1 mutations (11/12 Luminal); (4) TP53 pathway: TP53 mutations, MDM2 amplification and CDKN1A expression as functional markers; (5) BRCA1/2: germline variants in 47/507, BRCA1 associated with Basal-like; (6) Emerging SMGs: SF3B1 (K700E hotspot), RUNX1 and CBFB (both named with mutation counts), MAP2K4 (contiguous p38/JNK1 step with MAP3K1), TBX3 and FOXA1 (near significance); (7) PARADIGM hubs named with results: FOXM1 (Basal proliferation driver), FOXA1/ER complex (Luminal driver), MYC (cMYC amplification 8q24 Basal), ARNT/HIF1A; (8) Copy number drug targets named: FGFR1, FGFR2, IGFR1 (amplified), CDK4/CDK6 (with CCND1). Excluded: genes mentioned only in comparison to Shah et al. TNBC exome paper, genes only in Methods platform descriptions, or pathway names without individual gene data.
